checks.finding: Field Definitions pin Security-Sensitive:/Cross-Model-Waiver: names, setters, validity, and audit semantics; enforcement-chain surfaces enumerated identically in REQ-005 and AC-011; Edge Cases give concrete expected behavior.

The attempt-1 lite-track/critical contradiction is reconciled: REQ-004 and Non-goals both make Risk:critical/Security-Sensitive:true tasks ineligible for the lite track (rejected toward the full track), matched by AC-009/AC-016; Open Questions (3) records why. No other conflicts.

Each Edge Cases entry maps to an AC: ASCII/BOM->AC-015; prefix collision and absent dir->AC-006; vacuous no-PR->AC-014; read-only Bash over protected path->AC-012; malformed->AC-013; cwd false-denials->AC-005 + Risks; REQ-004 negative path->AC-008.
Open Questions is None with all four decisions resolved and rationale; the OIDC investigatory assumption is operationalized by REQ-005/AC-010 with a concrete resolution path either way.

Human-only boundaries are testable: R-10 gate deny (AC-001/002), Cross-Model-Waiver honored only with a co-located human Approval:Approved second-approver mark else fail-closed (AC-008), human-copy staging (B3), and REQ-005 post-session guard with fail and vacuous-pass paths (AC-011/AC-014).

Field Definitions, Roles, Main Workflows, Security Boundaries, Edge Cases, Risks, and a resolved Open Questions give the impl-policy reviewer the exact fields, waiver rule, lite-track rejection, cycle-limit contract, vacuous-pass, and ASCII constraint; remaining items are implementation architecture excluded by calibration.
